---
description: "Use when writing Next.js 14 App Router pages, layouts, components, hooks, or lib utilities for the GTM Engine frontend. Covers routing, auth guards, Supabase clients, state management, and UI patterns."
applyTo: "apps/web/**"
---

# Next.js 14 Frontend Guidelines

## App Router structure

```
app/
  (public)/          → unauthenticated: /, /login, /signup, /invite/accept
  (onboarding)/      → post-signup: /create-org, /onboarding
  (dashboard)/       → protected + onboarding-complete required
    layout.tsx        → auth guard + onboarding redirect
    dashboard/
    create/
    icp/
    campaigns/
    settings/
```

## Supabase clients — server vs browser

```typescript
// apps/web/lib/supabase/server.ts — for Server Components, Route Handlers, Middleware
import { createServerClient } from '@supabase/ssr'
import { cookies } from 'next/headers'
export function createSupabaseServer() {
  return createServerClient(
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
    process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!,
    { cookies: { getAll: () => cookies().getAll(), setAll: (cs) => cs.forEach(c => cookies().set(c)) } }
  )
}

// apps/web/lib/supabase/client.ts — for Client Components (singleton)
import { createBrowserClient } from '@supabase/ssr'
export const supabase = createBrowserClient(
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL!,
  process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY!
)
```

## Auth guard layout (dashboard)

```typescript
// app/(dashboard)/layout.tsx
import { redirect } from 'next/navigation'
import { createSupabaseServer } from '@/lib/supabase/server'

export default async function DashboardLayout({ children }) {
  const supabase = createSupabaseServer()
  const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser()
  if (!user) redirect('/login')

  const org_id = user.app_metadata?.org_id
  if (!org_id) redirect('/create-org')

  // Check onboarding_complete
  const { data: org } = await supabase.from('orgs').select('onboarding_complete').eq('id', org_id).single()
  if (!org?.onboarding_complete) redirect('/onboarding')

  return <>{children}</>
}
```

## Calling Edge Functions

```typescript
// Always use fetch with Authorization header — never expose service role key
const response = await fetch(`${process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL}/functions/v1/function-name`, {
  method: 'POST',
  headers: {
    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
    'Authorization': `Bearer ${session.access_token}`,  // user JWT, not service role
  },
  body: JSON.stringify(payload),
})
if (!response.ok) {
  const { error } = await response.json()
  throw new Error(error)
}
```

## State management

```typescript
// TanStack Query v5 — server state (API data, cache, refetch)
import { useQuery, useMutation, useQueryClient } from '@tanstack/react-query'

// Zustand v5 — client-only state (UI state, current job, quota display)
import { create } from 'zustand'
export const useOrgStore = create<OrgStore>((set) => ({
  quota: null,
  setQuota: (q) => set({ quota: q }),
}))
```

## shadcn/ui usage

Install components: `npx shadcn@latest add button card input label toast`

Import from `@/components/ui/...`. Never install shadcn components directly from npm — always use the CLI.

## Route protection middleware

```typescript
// middleware.ts (root of apps/web)
import { createServerClient } from '@supabase/ssr'
import { NextResponse } from 'next/server'
import type { NextRequest } from 'next/server'

export async function middleware(request: NextRequest) {
  // Refresh session cookies on every request — required for @supabase/ssr
  // See Supabase docs for full implementation
}

export const config = {
  matcher: ['/((?!_next/static|_next/image|favicon.ico|.*\\.(?:svg|png|jpg|jpeg|gif|webp)$).*)'],
}
```

## Role-based UI hiding

```typescript
// Read role from user.app_metadata.role — set by Edge Functions via app_metadata
// Hide restricted UI, but backend Edge Functions are the authoritative security gate
const role = user?.app_metadata?.role as 'owner' | 'admin' | 'member'
const canManageKeys = role === 'owner' || role === 'admin'
```

## Realtime subscriptions (generation job progress)

```typescript
useEffect(() => {
  const channel = supabase
    .channel(`job:${job_id}`)
    .on('broadcast', { event: 'status' }, (payload) => {
      setJobStatus(payload.status)
    })
    .subscribe()
  return () => { supabase.removeChannel(channel) }
}, [job_id])
```

## TypeScript types

Always import from `@/lib/supabase/types` (auto-generated by Supabase MCP `generate_typescript_types`). Regenerate after every schema change.

## Error and loading states

Every data-fetching page must have:
- **Loading:** skeleton screen (`<Skeleton />` from shadcn/ui)
- **Error:** user-friendly message + retry button (never raw error object)
- **Empty:** meaningful empty state with action CTA

## Sentry (Week 6)

```typescript
// Wrap root layout with Sentry error boundary
import * as Sentry from '@sentry/nextjs'
```
